visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A female character with long dark hair and a white rib-knit top stands in an indoor hallway. A male figure wearing a blue Adidas track jacket stands directly behind her, his facial features obscured by a digital blur filter. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the clean white interior. (2) The female character performs a series of rhythmic hand gestures, pointing at text overlays that appear in sequence. Her expressions shift from playful to dismissive as she reacts to the different 'ideal type' qualities displayed on the screen. (3) The man behind her leans forward and embraces her in a back hug. She smiles broadly at the camera, her facial arousal high as she points to herself and her partner, signaling the conclusion of the video's narrative reveal.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 99%女生理想型. [Slogan]: 99% of Girls Will Agree. [Subtitle]: 帥哥 ✅. (2) [Subtitle]: 暖男 ❌. (3) [Subtitle]: 只對我好的男生 ✅. (4) [Subtitle]: 愛喝冬瓜茶的男生 ✅. (5) [Subtitle]: 我已經有 💖.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop BGM starts with a heavy kick drum and bright synth melody. The rhythm is consistent and driving. (2) Short 'pop' sound effects trigger every few seconds, perfectly synchronized with the appearance of the text bubbles on the screen. There is no speech, but high-frequency vocal chops are mixed into the BGM. (3) The track maintains its full frequency spectrum and high arousal level throughout the duration, ending with a clean finish. The mix is professionally compressed and clear.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based -> Reveal: The video lists several generic 'ideal' traits before revealing the creator's actual relationship status as the punchline.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To participate in a viral social media trend where creators list criteria for an ideal partner, ultimately showing off their actual partner in a heartwarming or comedic reveal.
